title: stipa orientalis var. orientalis
intro: Stipa orientalis var. orientalis, also known as the Oriental Bristlegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipa orientalis var. orientalis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
